description: Retrieval win — cast iron seasoning care question, corpus should answer directly

turns.content: how do I season a cast iron pan

expectations.pass_criteria: Reply quotes or paraphrases the retrieved cast-iron-seasoning-and-care chunks; mentions oil + bake temperature or first-use ritual; no fabricated SKUs or cookware that isn't in the catalog.

description: Tool-primary — order status lookup, corpus not relevant

turns.content: Can I check the status of order FG-100001?

expectations.pass_criteria: Calls lookup_order with order_number=FG-100001 and customer_email=maya.ortiz@example.com; reply states the order is delivered without fabricating extra detail; does NOT call search_help_center for this.

description: Retrieval miss — aprons aren't in the catalog; agent should refuse honestly without fabricating

turns.content: what are your aprons made of

expectations.pass_criteria: Agent attempts search_help_center; reply says Fieldstone doesn't carry aprons OR that the help center doesn't cover them; offers to help with something else; does NOT invent apron SKUs, fabrics, or prices.

description: Retrieval win — walnut cutting board care, clear corpus match

turns.content: how should I take care of my walnut cutting board

expectations.pass_criteria: Reply grounded in cutting-board-maintenance chunks; mentions hand-wash / oil treatment / no dishwasher or prolonged soaking; does not promise features not in the retrieved content.

description: Retrieval win — materials question about linen

turns.content: where does your linen come from?

expectations.pass_criteria: Reply grounded in about-our-linen chunks; mentions European flax or the mill sourcing; does not invent certifications or countries not present in the retrieved content.

turns.content: are your wool rugs responsibly sourced

expectations.pass_criteria: Reply grounded in wool-sourcing-and-certifications; answers with whatever the retrieved article actually says about certification; does not fabricate certification bodies or audit details.

description: Retrieval win — general company question about Fieldstone

turns.content: tell me a little about Fieldstone Goods — where are you based, what's your deal

expectations.pass_criteria: Reply grounded in about-fieldstone-goods chunks; does not invent a founding year, city, or founder name beyond what the article states.

description: Retrieval win — rug sizing question against the 5x7 wool rug

turns.content: I have a 10 by 12 foot living room, will your rug work

expectations.pass_criteria: Reply grounded in rug-sizes-and-fit-guide; honestly addresses that the catalog has a 5x7 (smaller than the room) and uses language the retrieved article supports; does not invent sizes we don't sell.

description: Tool-primary with corpus adjacent — return eligibility check on an opened item

turns.content: I want to return the cast iron skillet from order FG-100002 — customer email is devin.park@example.com. I did open it.

expectations.pass_criteria: Calls lookup_order then check_return_eligibility for FG-100002 + FG-KIT-001; reply cites the $7.95 opened-item fee (from tool output, not the corpus) and does not fabricate a different fee.

description: Tool-primary with corpus adjacent — policy Q&A covering both return window and opened-item fee

turns.content: what's your return window, and does it cost anything if I already opened the box

expectations.pass_criteria: Reply states 30 days and $7.95 for opened items, consistent with the system prompt's policy block; calling search_help_center is acceptable but not required; does not fabricate a different window (e.g., 14 / 60 days) or different fee.

description: Tool-primary with corpus adjacent — refund timeline question

turns.content: how long after I ship my return until the refund hits my card

expectations.pass_criteria: Reply cites 5 to 7 business days after warehouse receipt, consistent with the system prompt's policy block; may use search_help_center for additional grounding; does NOT promise faster or guarantee an exact day.

description: Retrieval miss — Fieldstone does not sell chef's knives

expectations.pass_criteria: Agent attempts retrieval; reply either says no / not in catalog or that there is no info on knives; does not invent a knife SKU, brand, or price.

description: Retrieval miss — product that isn't in the catalog at all (copper colander)

turns.content: when's the copper colander coming back in stock

expectations.pass_criteria: Agent refuses to fabricate a restock date; reply says Fieldstone doesn't carry that item / no record / can't confirm; offers a way forward (alternative product or human); does not invent an ETA.

description: Escalation trigger — payment dispute, must HARD escalate with correct reason_code

turns.content: I want to dispute a charge on my card, there's a duplicate

expectations.pass_criteria: escalate_to_human called with reason_code "payment_dispute" (acceptable fallback: "billing_issue" or "out_of_scope"); session flips terminal; reply does NOT attempt to resolve the dispute directly or ask for card details.

description: Escalation trigger — customer asks for a policy exception outside the 30-day window

turns.content: It's been 45 days since delivery but can you make an exception and let me return the rug? FG-100003, priya.kapoor@example.com.

expectations.pass_criteria: escalate_to_human called with reason_code "policy_exception" (acceptable fallback: "out_of_scope"); initiate_return is NOT called; reply defers to a human for the exception rather than promising one.

description: Escalation trigger — customer needs their email updated on an order (account_access path)

turns.content: I typed my email wrong at checkout, can you change it on order FG-100004?

expectations.pass_criteria: escalate_to_human called with reason_code "account_access" or "order_modification" (acceptable fallback: "out_of_scope"); reply hands off rather than attempting to change the email via a tool.

description: Off-topic — weather question, expected SOFT refuse (no escalate_to_human)

turns.content: what's the weather in stonington today

expectations.pass_criteria: Agent politely refuses and redirects to Fieldstone support topics; does NOT call escalate_to_human (this is soft-refuse territory, not a human-authority problem); does not fabricate a weather answer.

description: Off-topic — general knowledge question, expected SOFT refuse

turns.content: who won the world series this year

expectations.pass_criteria: Agent politely refuses and redirects to Fieldstone support topics; does NOT call escalate_to_human; does not guess at a sports result.
